plugins.name: Upbit Official
plugins.description: Upbit Official API â Real-time crypto trading
plugins.description_long: Official API plugin for Upbit, Korea's largest cryptocurrency exchange. Supports real-time price quotes, market/limit orders, portfolio tracking, and full symbol scanning. Fully compatible with the auto-trading engine. Built on the pyupbit library for stable and reliable integration.
how_it_works: Get your API Key from your Upbit account (Open API management page)
Enter your API Key and Secret Key in the Store
Verify the connection with Test Connection
Activate and start trading via chatbot or auto-trading engine
plugins.auth_note: API Keys are encrypted and stored using Windows Credential Manager. Never stored in plain text.

plugins.name: Alpaca Markets
plugins.description: Alpaca Markets â US Stock & Crypto Trading
plugins.description_long: Official plugin for Alpaca, a commission-free US stock and crypto trading platform. Supports 8 markets including S&P 500, NASDAQ, NYSE, and crypto. Test strategies safely with Paper Trading mode. Features WebSocket real-time quotes and fractional shares support.
how_it_works: Create an Alpaca account and get your API Key (Paper or Live)
Enter your API Key and Secret Key in the Store
Verify the connection with Test Connection
Select markets to scan in Strategy Editor and start auto-trading
plugins.auth_note: Paper Trading keys are provided by default for risk-free testing. Keys are encrypted and stored securely.

plugins.name: Mock Broker
plugins.description: Mock Broker for testing â No real money
plugins.description_long: A virtual broker for development and testing. Test your trading strategies with simulated data without connecting to a real exchange. Ready to use immediately with the built-in test keys (mock_api_key / mock_secret_key).
how_it_works: Enter the default test keys: mock_api_key / mock_secret_key
Activate and test with virtual symbols like MOCK-BTC, MOCK-ETH
Switch to a real broker once your strategy is ready
plugins.auth_note: Test-only. No real funds are used.

plugins.name: Kalshi
plugins.description: Kalshi prediction market â CFTC-regulated, browser automation
plugins.description_long: Kalshi prediction market exchange via CDP (Chrome browser automation). Browse markets, view orderbook, place limit/market orders. CFTC-regulated. No API key needed â just log in.
how_it_works: Launch Chrome with remote debugging enabled
Log in to your Kalshi account in the browser
Activate this plugin â it connects via CDP automatically
plugins.auth_note: No credentials stored. Your login session stays in your browser. SandClaw never sees your password.

plugins.name: Robinhood
plugins.description: Robinhood â Commission-free stock & crypto trading via browser
plugins.description_long: Commission-free stock, crypto, and prediction market trading via Chrome browser automation. SandClaw connects to your Robinhood session through CDP â no API keys needed, just log in to your account. Supports stocks, fractional shares, crypto, and event contracts.
how_it_works: Launch Chrome with remote debugging enabled
Log in to your Robinhood account in the browser
Activate this plugin â it connects via CDP automatically
plugins.auth_note: No credentials stored. Your login session stays in your browser. SandClaw never sees your password.

plugins.name: Web Search (DuckDuckGo)
plugins.description: DuckDuckGo-based real-time web search â No API key required
plugins.description_long: Real-time web search plugin powered by DuckDuckGo. No API key required â works instantly. Search for the latest news, market data, and company information through the chatbot. Uses the privacy-respecting DuckDuckGo search engine.
how_it_works: Activate with no additional setup required
Ask the chatbot to search â e.g., 'search for...', 'find latest news about...'
Search results are included directly in the chatbot response
plugins.auth_note: No API key required. Uses DuckDuckGo's public search API.

plugins.name: Web Browsing (CDP)
plugins.description: General-purpose web browsing via CDP browser automation
plugins.description_long: General-purpose web browsing via CDP (Chrome browser automation). Browse any website, extract information, monitor pages. No API key needed â uses your real Chrome browser. Detects CAPTCHA/security challenges and pauses for user intervention.
how_it_works: Launch Chrome with remote debugging enabled
Activate this plugin in the Store
Use the chatbot to browse any website
CAPTCHA pages are detected automatically â solve in browser and retry
plugins.auth_note: No credentials needed. Uses your existing Chrome browser session.

plugins.name: SBI Securities (SBIè¨¼å¸)
plugins.description: SBI Securities â Japan's #1 broker via CDP (no API available)
plugins.description_long: SBI Securities (SBIè¨¼å¸) trading via CDP browser automation. Japan's largest online broker with 15M+ accounts. Supports Japanese stocks, US stocks, ETFs, futures and options. No API available â CDP is the only automation method. Full CDP scraping with login detection, balance/portfolio/quote retrieval, and 2-phase Safety Intercept order execution.
how_it_works: Launch Chrome with remote debugging enabled (port 9225)
Log in to your SBI Securities account in the browser
Activate this plugin â it connects via CDP automatically
Orders use 2-phase Safety Intercept: preview screenshot â user confirm â execute
plugins.auth_note: No credentials stored. Your login session stays in your browser. SandClaw never sees your password.

plugins.name: Rakuten Securities (æ¥½å¤©è¨¼å¸)
plugins.description: Rakuten Securities â Japan's #1 by accounts via CDP (no API available)
plugins.description_long: Rakuten Securities (æ¥½å¤©è¨¼å¸) trading via CDP browser automation. Japan's largest broker by account count with 13M+ accounts. Supports Japanese stocks, US stocks, ETFs, futures and options. No API available â CDP is the only automation method.
how_it_works: Launch Chrome with remote debugging enabled (port 9226)
Log in to your Rakuten Securities account in the browser
Activate this plugin â it connects via CDP automatically
plugins.auth_note: No credentials stored. Your login session stays in your browser. SandClaw never sees your password.

plugins.name: kabu STATION
plugins.description: kabu STATION API — 日本株の現在値・口座残高・売買注文
plugins.description_long: 三菱UFJ eスマート証券のkabu STATION APIを活用した日本株トレーディングプラグイン。東証プライム・スタンダード・グロース全銘柄、ETF対応。WebSocketリアルタイム、ランキング、自動売買エンジン対応。
how_it_works: kabu STATIONアプリを起動してAPI設定でパスワードを設定
StoreでAPIパスワードと取引パスワードを入力
チャットで「トヨタ 現在値」等で即時利用可能
plugins.auth_note: kabu STATIONデスクトップアプリがPCで起動中であることが必要です。パスワードはWindows Credential Managerに暗号化保存されます。
